title: Worldy
description: Yet another WorldMC mod. A simple fabric mod that enhances your experience on WorldMC
body:
Worldy is an addon onto the server WorldMC.org. This mod can be used to enhance your experience in the server as a player.

**What does it include?**

Right now, Worldy includes several features, like:
- Identical logout messages (Server only sends login messages)
- Stafflist overview of the server
- Easy modmenu (disable/enable all features you wish to use)
- Waypoint ecosystem to guide you to a specific location
- Alias commands from existing ones, eg: /local, /lc, /global, /bed, /home, ...
